name: WMI Remote Process Execution
description: Detects Windows Management Instrumentation being used for remote process execution
query:
// WMI Remote Execution
// WMI used to execute processes remotely
events from endpoint
where process_name = "wmiprvse.exe"
  and event_type = "process_create"
group by hostname, username
having count(*) > 3
within 300 seconds
